title: GroupTopper
description: An addon for Topper to create Group/Team/Clan/... leaderboards - DEMO VERSION
body:
# Info

This is an addon of [Topper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/topper-lb) to add Group Leaderboard, a leaderboard to display the rankings of your player's groups (factions, towns, parties, etc.). It's designed with big servers in mind, allowing it to be heavily optimized (tested in some servers).

# Feature

- Run on [Topper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/topper-lb) - A leaderboard plugin
- Support multiple group plugins - [List](https://topper-mc.github.io/Wiki/grouptopper/holder/group/)
- Built-in group strategies - How to combine the values of the group members
  + `MIN`: Use the minimum value of the members
  + `MAX`: Use the maximum value of the members
  + `OWNER`: Use only the value of the group owner
  + `TOTAL`: Sum up all the values of the members
- [PlaceholderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) support with placeholders to get information of the group rankings
- Multiple Data Storage support: YAML, JSON, SQLITE and MYSQL

# DEMO VERSION

This version allows users to try the addon before considering buying the full version. It comes with some limitation:
- Support creating only 1 (one) leaderboard
- Use local storage (.properties), no SQLITE or MYSQL
- Support only `MIN`, `MAX` and `OWNER` group strategies
- Some messages to tell the server owners to about the demo version and how to buy the full version

Go to [this page](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/grouptopper.124971/) to buy the full version
